description: Initial machine-readable documentation registry seed for discoverability and routing metadata.

active-architecture.representation: Index canonical architecture-overview and architecture-reference docs that define active system boundaries.

active-contributors.representation: Index contributor-guide docs that govern active implementation workflows and review guardrails.

active-operations.representation: Index operational runbooks and diagnostics guidance used for current runtime operation.

context-packs.representation: Index curated context packs as reusable routing anchors instead of indexing every supporting context artifact.

adr-records.representation: Index ADR entries for active and superseded decision lineage, with status and linkage preserved.

baselines.representation: Index only durable baseline anchors and migration references; avoid exhaustive snapshot-by-snapshot indexing.

superseded-and-historical.representation: Index only curated superseded pointers or historical stubs when needed for redirects, traceability, or compliance.

router-readmes.representation: Router files remain navigation wrappers and should not be indexed as authority records.

templates.representation: Authoring templates are scaffolds and are excluded from registry entries.

prompt-helpers.representation: Prompt helper snippets are excluded unless promoted into canonical guidance docs.

ai-companion-duplicates.representation: AI companion paths should be represented through aiPath on indexed human entries, not duplicate records.

entries.title: ADR-001 Single Authoritative Control Plane
entries.summary: Foundational ADR that requires a single authoritative control plane for host composition, routing, and policy enforcement decisions.

entries.title: ADR-002 Workspace-Centered Tenancy and Resource Ownership
entries.summary: Architecture decision record establishing workspace-centered tenancy and ownership boundaries.

entries.title: ADR-003 Storage as Managed Platform Resource
entries.summary: Architecture decision record defining storage as a managed platform resource with governed lifecycle contracts.

entries.title: ADR-004 Studios as Views Over Shared System and Asset Model
entries.summary: Architecture decision record defining studios as bounded views over shared system and asset authority.

entries.title: ADR-005 Trust, Identity, and Security Boundary Enforcement
entries.summary: Architecture decision record enforcing fail-closed trust, identity, and security boundary controls.

entries.title: ADR-006 Policy-Aware Scheduling and Controlled Execution
entries.summary: Architecture decision record requiring policy-aware scheduling and controlled execution transitions.

entries.title: Architecture Document Scope Boundaries
entries.summary: Clarifies what belongs in architecture docs versus contributors, operations, baselines, and ADRs.

entries.summary: Overview for inner platform composition boundaries and core domain/application contracts.

entries.summary: Overview for run lifecycle authority, scheduling policy, and execution dispatch-readiness boundaries.

entries.summary: Overview for fail-closed identity, trust, authorization, and secret-safe security boundaries.

entries.title: Architecture Domain Migration Inventory
entries.summary: Inventories architecture migration targets for moving flat architecture material into domain folders.

entries.summary: Overview for host composition, startup lifecycle, and runtime boundary contracts across host types.

entries.title: Studio and System Composition Domain Overview
entries.summary: Overview for studio composition boundaries that project shared system and workflow contracts.

entries.summary: Specifies the prioritized architecture migration sequence for high-value domainization work.

entries.title: Documentation Identity, Stable Keys, and Reference Conventions
entries.summary: Defines stable document identity keys and cross-artifact reference conventions for durable routing and validation.

entries.title: Canonical Documentation Taxonomy
entries.summary: Defines canonical document classification and lifecycle semantics for routing and validation.

entries.summary: Core architecture pack for layer boundaries, domain/application contracts, and host composition invariants before code changes.

entries.summary: Selective migration-planning baseline retained for documentation lineage and active-vs-historical separation decisions.

entries.summary: Archived feature-level baseline handoff describing initial documentation-foundation guarantees and deferred scope.
